name: Quality Harness Spec
summary: Successfully created comprehensive quality harness specification for the meeting processing pipeline with 4-stage validation framework

tasks.task: Analyze existing manifest schema and processing pipeline
tasks.notes: Reviewed manifest-v3 schema from D2.1 and processor.py to understand validation requirements
Created comprehensive framework covering pre-processing, identification, block generation, and post-processing stages

tasks.task: Specify pass/fail thresholds for all checks
tasks.notes: Defined specific thresholds for transcript length (≥300 chars), participant confidence (≥0.7), calendar match (≥0.6), and block output quality

tasks.task: Define retry logic with exponential backoff
tasks.notes: Implemented 3-attempt retry system with 30s/60s/120s delays and specific retry strategies per check type

tasks.task: Define HITL escalation triggers and process
tasks.notes: Created P0/P1/P2 escalation framework with specific triggers, queue structure, and notification process
Aligned quality checks with existing manifest v3 quality_gate object from D2.1

acceptance_criteria.all_checks_documented: ✅ 16 distinct quality checks defined across 4 pipeline stages
acceptance_criteria.thresholds_defined: ✅ Specific pass/fail thresholds defined for each check with measurable criteria
acceptance_criteria.retry_logic_specified: ✅ 3-attempt retry framework with exponential backoff and stage-specific strategies
acceptance_criteria.escalation_triggers_defined: ✅ P0/P1/P2 escalation framework with specific triggers and review queue structure

quality_framework_features: 4-stage validation: pre-processing, identification, block generation, post-processing
16 specific quality checks with measurable pass/fail thresholds
Exponential backoff retry logic (30s/60s/120s) with max 3 attempts
P0/P1/P2 escalation system with automatic HITL queue assignment
Integration with manifest v3 quality_gate object
check_categories: Transcript validation (length, format, encoding, duration consistency)
Participant identification (confidence, host identification, external verification)
Calendar matching (confidence score, meeting type consistency)
Block generation quality (output length, format compliance, hallucination detection)
Pipeline completion (all blocks generated, no errors, manifest completeness)
escalation_framework: P0: Critical failures requiring immediate attention (corruption, system errors)
P1: Standard issues requiring human judgment (low confidence, identification failures)
P2: Batch review items for process improvement (minor format issues, borderline scores)
Review queue in N5/review/meetings/ with structured batch files

dependencies_satisfied: D2.1 - Manifest v3 schema provides quality_gate structure and field definitions

integration_points.manifest_v3: quality_gate object tracks validation results and overall score
integration_points.processing_pipeline: Stage gates prevent progression until quality checks pass
integration_points.retry_system: Automatic retry coordination with manifest status updates
integration_points.hitl_queue: Structured escalation to N5/review/meetings/ for human intervention

next_steps: Quality harness specification ready for implementation in Stream 3 processing modules (D3.1-D3.4)
